name: French Onion Soup (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 8 cups onions, cut into thin half circles
4 fresh garlic bulbs, pressed or minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, sauté half the onions until they are deep brown but not burned. Cook them until well browned and tender yet still have a bit of firmness. Add water as needed to prevent sticking.
2. If using butter, sauté the onions in butter instead.
3. Repeat with the remaining onions.
4. In a 3-4 quart pot, combine the sauteed onions, garlic, and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for about 20 minutes or until the soup broth is flavorful.
5. Turn off the burner to the lowest setting.
6. Add tamari soy sauce and powdered vegetable broth. If desired, add a little more water.
7. Serve hot topped with cheese and croutons or French bread.
